input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" --jq '.[].body'

REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36" --jq '{body: .body, state: .state, requested_reviewers: .requested_reviewers, review_comments: .review_comments}'
input.description: Check all PR comments and metadata

content.content:
[]{"body":"## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean
